subject: Please help: Crash M during refinement
body:
Hello
I encountered crush during refinement in M (version 1.09).
The last crash error message is here
 11/15/2024 10:40:41:
System.ObjectDisposedException: Cannot access a closed pipe.
   at System.IO.__Error.PipeNotOpen()
   at System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream.CheckConnectOperationsServer()
   at System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream.WaitForConnection()
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.SendCommand(NamedSerializableObject command)
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Dispose()
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Finalize()
   at System.IO.__Error.PipeNotOpen()
   at System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream.CheckConnectOperationsServer()
   at System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream.WaitForConnection()
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.SendCommand(NamedSerializableObject command)
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Dispose()
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Finalize()

and worker_1_crash message is here
System.IndexOutOfRangeException: Index was outside the bounds of the array.
   at Warp.Sociology.Species.PrepareRefinementRequisites(Boolean makeRefs, 
Int32 singleGPU) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Sociology\Species.cs:line 0
   at WarpWorker.Program.Main(String[] args) in 
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpWorker\Program.cs:line 254

I have 67 tomograms and total particle number is 60K.
I originally used unbin data with 192 box size and got the same crash 
message.

After that, I thought this is due to the too large box size, therefore, 
also tried 2 bin with 96 box size. The error message is from this 2 bin 
data.

The memory of our GPU shown in M is GPU 0: 23276MB and GPU1 ; 15239 MB.
I went through the forum, but I could not find the post reporting the same 
issues (sorry if I missed). 
Any suggestions are appreciated. 
Thank you very much in advance.

Reika
